heading: Tonight
text: A few scattered evening showers mainly north, diminishing overnight. Chance of valley fog. Lows in the 50s, a few 40s in the cold spots. Light wind.

heading: Monday
text: Some morning sun north, becoming cloudy, with an increasing chance of showers through the afternoon. Highs in the 70s. Light and variable wind.

heading: Monday Night
text: Evening showers, tapering off west to east. Partial clearing. Lows in the 50s to near 60 along Lake Champlain. Calm wind.
